name: thread.handoff_state
description: Reduce generic post-handoff signals and suppression records into the current handoff state.

handoff_id.description: Stable id for the outward handoff being reduced.

boundary_kind.description: Optional boundary kind for the far side of the handoff.

target_repo.description: Optional target repository slug for repo-scoped suppression matching.

target_locator.description: Optional target locator for target-scoped suppression matching.

contact_locator.description: Optional contact locator for contact-scoped suppression matching.

signals.description: Observed handoff_signal records to replay for this handoff.

suppressions.description: Durable suppression_record policies to apply after signal replay.

now.description: Optional ISO timestamp used for suppression expiry checks.

candidate_disposition.description: Optional signal disposition to check against the reduced state.

required_outbox_status.description: Optional handoff_state status required before an outbox push. Defaults to approved_to_send.
